title: galium mollugo var. elatum
intro: Galium mollugo var. elatum, also known as tall bedstraw, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenes, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Galium mollugo var. elatum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to aid in relaxation, reduce menstrual cramps, and promote overall well-being.
